title: bauhinia divaricata
intro: Bauhinia divaricata, also known as the butterfly orchid or twining bauhinia, is a flowering plant species in the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in various forms for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bauhinia divaricata include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Bauhinia divaricata can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
